source.notes: Guided-path section titles and explanatory copy are authored for the taxpayer-facing Guided Parcel Review prototype.

your-property.title: What changed about this property?
your-property.description: Begin with ownership, location, class, land, dwelling facts, and record-card detail.

your-assessment.title: What changed about the assessed value?
your-assessment.description: Separate current value movement from finalized tax years.

your-taxes.title: What does this mean for taxes?
your-taxes.description: Read levy, credits, districts, and net tax separately.

market-area.title: How does this compare nearby?
market-area.description: Start with the property's local comparison group.

county-equalization.title: Is the value base being checked for fairness?
county-equalization.description: Equalization checks required level and reasonable uniformity before levies are applied.

state-context.title: How does the county compare statewide?
state-context.description: Use statewide CTL data as broader context.

review-checklist.title: Need to review anything?
review-checklist.description: Check whether the source facts line up.
